content.problemStatement:
Chef and his competitor Kefa own two restaurants located at a straight road. The position of Chef's restaurant is X1X_1X1тАЛ, the position of Kefa's restaurant is X2X_2X2тАЛ.

Chef and Kefa found out at the same time that a bottle with a secret recipe is located on the road between their restaurants. The position of the bottle is X3X_3X3тАЛ.

The cooks immediately started to run to the bottle. Chef runs with speed V1V_1V1тАЛ, Kefa with speed V2V_2V2тАЛ.

Your task is to figure out who reaches the bottle first and gets the secret recipe (of course, it is possible that both cooks reach the bottle at the same time).
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains five space-separated integers X1X_1X1тАЛ, X2X_2X2тАЛ, X3X_3X3тАЛ, V1V_1V1тАЛ and V2V_2V2тАЛ.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"Chef"` if Chef reaches the bottle first, `"Kefa"` if Kefa reaches the bottle first or `"Draw"` if Chef and Kefa reach the bottle at the same time (without quotes).

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1. Chef and Kefa are on the same distance from the bottle, but Kefa has speed 222, while Chef has speed 111.
